property.title: Keshav Singh wala plot
property.notes:
ye wali deal ram shankar bhadouriya ne ki hai, naresh saxena waha nhi the, vo fatehabad the keval phone se bat huyi hai, or ye deal anup or pappu rathore se bina bataye ki hai..

seller.name: Jeetu S/o Rameshwar & Lala Ram S/o Keshav Singh (Raipura)

property.title: Goverdhan ki Thhar, Mustafabad Chauraha ke beech
property.location: Goverdhan ki Thhar, Mustafabad Chauraha ke beech, Verma Speler wale ke bagal
property.notes:
Sauda 1800000  (18 lakh) rupee ki huyi hai hmari sauda shri chand prajapati se huyi hai, ye zameen unke mitra ke bachho ke name me hai, mitra ki sauda hone ke bad death ho chuki hai, Shri chand ne ye sauda mitra se 17 lakh me batayi hai hame, Advance 50000 rs phuch chuke hai.. 

- Ek side 39.5 hai bad me sahi krni hai..
